title: stevia viejoana
intro: Stevia viejoana, a plant native to Paraguay, is a member of the sunflower family and is also known as a wild stevia or a perennial herb. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stevia viejoana include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering blood pressure, and providing protection against certain cancers and infections. Herbal preparations of Stevia viejoana can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
